title: monday dev official product lifecycle positioning
claim: monday dev positions itself as one platform to plan roadmaps, manage sprints, release products, monitor issues, and share documentation with AI support.
source_snippet: The product page explicitly covers roadmap planning, sprint management, release coordination, analytics, and AI-powered summaries.
implication: ProductOS should keep the lifecycle-wide view but add stricter gate evidence and artifact traceability than flexible work boards usually provide by default.
followup_questions: Which artifact relationships in monday dev are modeled structurally versus conventionally?
